description: A floral-fruity fragrance, Beauty by calvin klein opens with bergamot, red berries and peach Bellini, with a heart of peony, pink lily and jasmine and base notes of sandalwood, musk and vanilla blossom.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
